description: Screen AI agents, read Badge fitness scores, and browse the public Talent Pool leaderboard.
name: io.github.thehomer87/badge-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Badge API key (create under Settings -> API keys). Required for screen_agent; optional for read-only tools.
environmentVariables.name: BADGE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Badge REST API base URL. Defaults to https://api.badgeia.com.
environmentVariables.name: BADGE_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Override for the human-facing web origin used in verify/agent/leaderboard links. Auto-derived from BADGE_API_URL when unset.
environmentVariables.name: BADGE_WEB_URL
